changes: Added Notifications config read (Webhook URL + On events token set) to Configuration section
Added run_id generation (compact ISO-8601 basic-format) and pipeline-started webhook after state.json init in Step 0 (MCP pre-flight)
Step 3 (spec-analyst): added pre-dispatch usage init writes (started_at, model, status: in_progress, counters=0) and post-dispatch usage capture + step-completed webhook (step_name: spec_analysis)
Step 3a (code-analyst): added pre-dispatch usage init writes and post-dispatch usage capture + step-completed webhook (step_name: code_analysis); skip webhook noted for skipped stage (WEBHOOK-R7)
Step 4 (architect): added pre-dispatch usage init writes and post-dispatch usage capture + step-completed webhook (step_name: architect)

Step 6b/6d (fixer-reviewer loop): added pre-loop stage init; cumulative usage accumulation per iteration (COST-R5, no per-iteration array); step-completed webhook fires once on APPROVE/block with iteration_count (WEBHOOK-R6)
Step 6e (test-engineer): added pre-dispatch usage init writes and post-dispatch usage capture + step-completed webhook (step_name: test); skip webhook excluded (WEBHOOK-R7)
Step 6f-deploy (deployment-verifier): added pre-dispatch usage init writes and post-dispatch usage capture + step-completed webhook (step_name: deployment); skip webhook excluded (WEBHOOK-R7)
Step 6g (e2e-test-engineer): added pre-dispatch usage init writes and post-dispatch usage capture + step-completed webhook (step_name: e2e_test); skip webhook excluded (WEBHOOK-R7)
Step 6h (acceptance-gate): added pre-dispatch usage init writes and post-dispatch usage capture + step-completed webhook (step_name: acceptance_gate); skip webhook excluded (WEBHOOK-R7)

Step 10 (publisher): added pre-dispatch usage init writes and post-dispatch usage capture + step-completed webhook; pipeline accumulator written before terminal status (COST-R6); summary_table echoed to stdout; pipeline-completed webhook fired after terminal status write
Step X (block handler): added pipeline accumulator write before terminal status; pipeline-completed webhook with outcome: blocked
gate1_constraints_respected: Existing spec-analyst / architect / decomposition flow unchanged
Acceptance gate logic unchanged (single-pass vs decomposition conditions preserved)

Decomposition pathway: events fire at stage boundaries; each subtask runs through the same fixer_reviewer+test stage with cumulative accumulation; parent run_id remains throughout; child subtasks dispatched via fix-ticket get their own run_ids
maps_to traceability in architect output unchanged
WEBHOOK-R6 respected: step-completed fires once per top-level stage, not per fixer-reviewer iteration
WEBHOOK-R7 respected: no step-skipped events, no webhooks for skipped stages
feature_specific_notes: Stage canonical names used: spec_analysis, code_analysis, architect, fixer_reviewer, test, e2e_test, deployment, acceptance_gate, publisher
Decomposition pathway: implement-feature retains its parent run_id throughout; when decomposition occurs and fix-ticket is eventually called per subtask, those child runs get their own run_ids
Fixer-reviewer cumulative accumulation restarts per subtask in decomposition mode (each subtask gets its own fixer_reviewer iteration set)
